description: Body language & communication coaching app using Hollywood movie clips

active_tasks.description: Design the ObservationGuide component: technique breakdown with timestamps, shown on clip detail page before the learner clicks Record.
Add observationGuide JSON field to Clip schema, build AI generation route, implement ObservationGuide component and integrate into clip detail page.
Write observation_guide data for all 15 clips in clips-seed.json (technique list with timestamps and why-it-works explanations).
Design the full Duolingo-style step-by-step practice flow: stepper UI, micro-recorder card, step feedback display, unlock Full Performance flow.
New PracticeStep + MicroSession models, micro-session API, step-by-step practice page, MicroRecorder with 30s limit, Whisper audio for vocal clips, instant per-step feedback.
Design onboarding assessment flow (5-skill quiz), learning path dashboard, SkillProgressBar level indicator, LearningPathCard next-clip recommendation.
SkillBaseline + LearningPath models, assessment API, baseline scoring logic, learning path algorithm, dashboard page, skill progress tracking.
Brand brief, pitch deck (PPTX), one-pager, VC outreach emails, demo script
Review and approve M10: Script-Aware Coaching Loop. Check CharacterBanner, ScriptPanel, ActionPlan components. Verify AI feedback works end-to-end. Designer UI review already PASSED.
Review and approve M11 (Observation Guide). BE has signaled ready. Data seeded.
Review and approve M12 (Micro-Practice Stepper). BE has signaled ready.
Review and approve M13: Onboarding Assessment + Learning Path Dashboard.

New schema fields added (observationGuide, PracticeStep, MicroSession, SkillBaseline, screenplaySource, FoundationCourse, FoundationLesson, LessonExample, QuizQuestion, FoundationProgress). User must run: npm run db:push → npx prisma generate → npm run db:seed

Curate 100+ YouTube clips from films with publicly available screenplays. Each clip needs full metadata including screenplaySource URL, script excerpt, observation_guide, practice_steps. Save to .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json.

Add screenplaySource field to Clip schema. Update Admin CMS ClipForm. Update Library page with Film + Screenplay filters. Update ClipCard with screenplay badge. Update clip detail with screenplay link.
Design Library filter enhancements for 100+ clips: Film filter, screenplay badge on ClipCard, screenplay link on clip detail. Spec at .shared/outputs/design/m14-spec.md
After data-engineer delivers clips-100-seed.json: run npm run db:push, npx prisma generate, npm run db:seed. Verify 100+ clips in DB.
Review and approve M14: Library has 100+ clips, all with screenplay_source. Filter by film works. Screenplay badge visible. DB seed clean.
Design the full Performing Foundation section: course catalog, course detail, lesson page (theory + examples + quiz). Spec at .shared/outputs/design/m15-spec.md
Build the Performing Foundation section. 5 new Prisma models, /foundation pages, quiz client, progress API, NavBar link. Seed.ts updated for foundation curriculum.

Write all Foundation curriculum content: 3 courses × 10+ lessons each. Each lesson: theoryHtml (600-900 words), 2-3 YouTube examples, 4 quiz questions. Save to .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json

After backend-engineer adds Foundation models and data-engineer delivers foundation-curriculum.json: run npm run db:push, npx prisma generate, npm run db:seed. Verify foundation courses, lessons, examples, quiz questions in DB.
Review and approve M15: Foundation section at /foundation. 3 courses accessible. Lessons load with theory + examples + quiz. Quiz scores save. Progress persists. NavBar links to Foundation.
Document M14 and M15 in activity-log.md once each milestone is approved by Tester.

Deploy all M10–M15 backend code to Vercel production. Commits include: ae12429, 6dff36e, 538cbac, d2f93e0 plus M14+M15 backend. New routes: /foundation, /onboarding, /dashboard, /library/[id]/practice. Run npm run db:push + npx prisma generate + npm run db:seed after deploy.

resolved.description: YouTube video IDs — all 15 verified via YouTube Data API v3
DATABASE_URL — Neon DB connected, schema pushed, 15 clips seeded
OPENAI_API_KEY — set in Vercel env vars
M7+M8 auth deployment — NEXTAUTH_SECRET+URL in Vercel, db:push confirmed in sync, admin:create seeded admin@seeneyu.com, code deployed

closed_bugs.description: ClipForm score dimension fields allow 1-10 but model expects 1-3
Library page crash — ClipCard.tsx missing 'use client'
